ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( ISPICKVAL( Type, 'Feature Update')), RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', ISCHANGED(Probability), Probability >= 0.5, ISBLANK(TEXT(Competition__c)), RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Rank_Ranger", RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Acquired_Company", $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate a Using a Competitor
